concept.title: SDK Authentication Overview
concept.shortdesc: Learn how authentication works in the NX Messaging SDK.

conbody.p: The NX Messaging SDK uses API keys and OAuth 2.0 tokens to authenticate requests. Authentication ensures secure communication between your application and the API.

section.title: API Key Authentication
section.p: API keys are unique identifiers generated from the developer portal. They must be included in every request header.

section.title: OAuth 2.0
section.p: OAuth provides token-based authentication and is recommended for enterprise applications.

conbody.note: Never expose API keys in frontend applications. Use environment variables or secure storage.
